mapper.select: SELECT USERID, USERNAME, EMAIL, UPOINT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') REGDATE FROM TUSER ORDER BY USERID ASC
SELECT USERID, PWD, USERNAME, EMAIL, UPOINT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE FROM TUSER WHERE USERID = #{ userid }
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TUSER(USERID, PWD, USERNAME, EMAIL, UPOINT, REGDATE) VALUES( #{ userid }, #{ pwd }, #{ username }, #{ email }, #{ upoint }, #{ regdate })
INSERT INTO TUSER(USERID, PWD, USERNAME, EMAIL) VALUES( #{ userid }, #{ pwd }, #{ username }, #{ email })
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TUSER WHERE USERID = #{ userid }
mapper.update: UPDATE TUSER SET USERNAME = #{username}, PWD = #{pwd}, EMAIL = #{email} WHERE USERID = #{userid}
